title: Welcome & company intro
objective: Make the new hire feel welcome and understand our mission, values, team and what we build.

beats.narration: Welcome to Acme. Let me show you who we are in sixty seconds.
beats.on_screen: Presenter to camera; Acme title card.
beats.caption: Welcome to Acme
beats.note: Hook: warm, one line, sets the promise.

beats.narration: We build developer tools that make shipping software feel effortless. That mission drives every decision.
beats.caption: We make shipping effortless
beats.note: Mission, at the identity layer (what it means), not a feature list.

beats.narration: Three values guide us: ship small, own the outcome, and leave the codebase better than you found it.
beats.caption: Ship small · Own it · Leave it better
beats.broll: Montage of a small team pairing at laptops, a green CI check, a clean merge — energetic, no presenter.
beats.note: B-roll: VO over visuals; keep the three values crisp for the caption.

beats.narration: You're joining a small, senior team where your first pull request ships in week one.
beats.on_screen: Presenter to camera; optional team photo.
beats.caption: Your PR ships week one

beats.narration: Next up: the tools and accounts you'll need. Let's get you set up.
beats.on_screen: Presenter to camera; end card pointing to episode 2.
beats.caption: Next: your tools
beats.note: Outro: one clear next step (to episode 2).
